title: Variant and Variant shredding are now generally available
body:
Variant is now [generally available](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). Variant is a flexible data type for semi-structured data that delivers structured-like query performance through Variant shredding, which is also generally available. Use Variant to ingest semi-structured data from streaming sources (Kinesis, Event Hub), REST APIs, and schemaless databases, while maintaining high-performance query access.

Starting with Databricks Runtime 17.3, Variant shredding is automatically enabled when you create a new table with `VARIANT` columns. For optimal query performance with variant statistics collection and data skipping, Databricks recommends Databricks Runtime 18.1 or above. See [Use variant shredding to optimize performance](/aws/en/tables/features/variant-shredding).

Variant is coming soon to workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled.

ref_links.text: Use variant shredding to optimize performance
